tracks.meaning: the total number of units or items determined by counting
to determine the total number of something by adding one unit at a time
a separate charge or claim in a legal indictment or complaint
to be important or have significance in a decision or outcome
a numerical value representing the number of occurrences or iterations in a program
the number of shares, items, or units held in inventory or investment
to include or consider someone or something as part of a group
a rhythmic signal given by a conductor or musician to mark the beat
the total number of points scored by a team or player in a game
to rely on or depend on someone or something for support or assistance
to be taken into account or considered in an evaluation or assessment
a nobleman or aristocrat of a specified rank in European feudal systems
